title: Inventario Brand Kit
description: Per-tenant brand customization payload. Validates input from organisation admin UI before persisting to backend (`organisations.brandKit` field) and before generating runtime CSS override blocks. Schema deliberately covers ONLY the brand layer of design tokens — primitive and semantic layers are not overridable. This keeps multi-tenant UI predictable while giving each tenant a recognisable identity. See BRAND.md §8 for the underlying policy.

tenantId.description: Stable slug identifying the tenant. Used as the value of the `data-tenant` attribute on the html element. Lowercase ASCII letters, digits, and hyphens only. Length 2-40.

version.description: Brand kit schema version. Bumped when the schema introduces breaking changes. Allows the runtime to apply migration logic for older brand kits.

displayName.description: Tenant-facing display name, shown in UI alongside or instead of the Inventario wordmark depending on the plan. Free-form, 1-80 chars.

logoUrl.description: HTTPS URL to a tenant logo (PNG or SVG). Recommended dimensions 256x256 px or SVG with 1:1 aspect ratio. Served from tenant CDN or Inventario asset storage.

colors.description: Brand color overrides. Each value MUST pass WCAG 2.1 AA contrast against its paired foreground in normal text size. The backend rejects payloads where contrast falls below 4.5:1.

primary.description: Primary brand color. Overrides --inv-brand-primary. Used for hero backgrounds, primary CTAs, navigation. Inventario default is navy.700 (#1a2d47).

primaryFg.description: Foreground color used on top of primary. Typically white. Overrides --inv-brand-primary-fg.

accent.description: Accent color. Overrides --inv-brand-accent. Used for links, status highlights, logo dot. Inventario default is blue.500 (#388fc3).

accentFg.description: Foreground color used on top of accent. Typically white. Overrides --inv-brand-accent-fg.

logoDot.description: Color of the logo accent dot. Per BRAND.md §3 this only applies when the tenant uses a custom logo. Defaults to accent if omitted.

typography.description: Optional typography overrides. Most tenants stay with Poppins; enterprise customers occasionally request their corporate font.

fontFamilySans.description: Font family stack for sans-serif text. MUST end with a generic fallback (sans-serif). The named font MUST be available via the tenant CSS bundle, Inventario default fonts, or system fonts.

metadata.description: Free-form tenant metadata. Not used by the runtime, but persisted alongside the brand kit for audit and support purposes. Avoid storing PII here — that belongs in the organisation profile, not the brand kit.

createdBy.description: User id of the admin who first uploaded the brand kit.

notes.description: Free-form notes from the tenant admin (e.g. why a specific color was chosen).

HexColor.description: Hex color in #RRGGBB format. Lowercase letters preferred but uppercase accepted.

metadata.notes: Modrá pochádza z mestského erbu, zlatá z radničnej veže.
